modern-villa-interior.title: Modern villa
modern-villa-interior.concept: A contemporary residential project blending minimalist aesthetics with warm natural materials. The design focuses on open layouts, clean lines, and a neutral palette with champagne gold accents.

luxury-office-space.title: Luxury office
luxury-office-space.concept: An executive office environment designed to inspire productivity while maintaining refined elegance. Premium materials and bespoke furniture define every corner.

classic-majlis-design.title: Classic majlis
classic-majlis-design.concept: A traditional majlis reimagined with classic craftsmanship and luxurious fabrics. Ornate details meet subtle contemporary touches for a space that honours heritage and comfort.

boutique-hotel-lobby.title: Boutique hotel lobby
boutique-hotel-lobby.concept: A striking boutique hotel lobby designed to captivate guests from the moment they arrive. Dramatic lighting, curated art, and fine furniture create an unforgettable first impression.

modern-penthouse-suite.title: Modern penthouse
modern-penthouse-suite.concept: A city penthouse where floor-to-ceiling windows meet sleek contemporary design.

heritage-palace-renovation.title: Heritage palace renovation
heritage-palace-renovation.concept: A careful renovation of a heritage palace preserving its historic grandeur while introducing modern comfort seamlessly.
